insights.title: Volume Leaders: CA, TX, FL Account for 28% of Reports
insights.statement: California (238,705), Texas (162,101), and Florida (159,307) lead in raw fraud report volume. Together they account for 28.2% of all state-level fraud reports.

insights.title: Per Capita Tells a Different Story
insights.statement: When normalized by population, District of Columbia (1053.9 per 100K), Nevada (774.66), and Colorado (773.32) have the highest fraud rates. Largest ≠ highest risk.

insights.title: Loss Density Peaks in Unexpected States
insights.statement: Arizona leads in loss per 100K population ($4,633,611), followed by District of Columbia and Nevada. High-loss-density states don't always overlap with high-volume states.

insights.title: Florida Metros Dominate Per-Capita Rankings
insights.statement: Miami (2,793 per 100K), Sebastian-Vero Beach (2,612), and Orlando (2,330) — all Florida metros — occupy 3 of the top 5 per-capita MSA positions. Florida's fraud concentration extends beyond its state-level ranking.
insights.metric: 3 of top 5 MSAs are in Florida
